Create Vendor

Add a new vendor or supplier to the system

Vendor Code Code is required Cannot exceed 20 characters Vendor Name Name is required Cannot exceed 100 characters
Contact Person Contact person is required Cannot exceed 100 characters Email Address Email is required Invalid email format
Phone Number Phone number is required GST Number / Tax ID GST is required Cannot exceed 15 characters
Street Address Address is required
City City is required State / Region State is required
Country Country is required Postal / ZIP Code Postal code is required
Website
